diagnosis_and_recommendations.hypothesis: Validation run report was never generated because the validation workflow did not complete or the collection script failed
actions: Retry validation using push-trigger (empty commit + push) and poll for a longer window
Ensure the workflow on the target branch includes a 'workflow_dispatch' trigger if programmatic dispatch is desired
Verify that the validation collection script uploads/writes '.gh-run-scripts/selfheal_validation_report.json' at end-of-run and has error handling/logging
If runs appear with jobs=0 or logs missing, collect run ids and workflow snapshots and escalate to GitHub Support with artifacts

diagnosis_and_recommendations.hypothesis: Workflow file at the run's head_sha differed (missing diagnostic steps or triggers), causing dispatch/polling mismatch
actions: When a failing run is observed, save the workflow file content for that run's head_sha (raw.githubusercontent.com/<sha>/... )
Add an early diagnostic job to the workflow that uploads a tiny artifact proving job start (already proposed in patch)

notes: No validation report was available to parse. The JSON above describes the failure to locate the report and next recommended steps. Use existing diagnostic artifact zips to inspect logs if needed.
